title: Godrej Appliances is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Appliances is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Appliances are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Appliances:
Godrej Appliances is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Appliances!
